deploy.startCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const exists=fs.existsSync('/app/backend/dist/server.js'); console.log('dist/server.js exists:', exists); if(exists){ console.log('First 3 lines:', fs.readFileSync('/app/backend/dist/server.js','utf8').split('\n').slice(0,3).join('\n')); } console.log('backend dist files:', fs.readdirSync('/app/backend/dist').join(', ')); process.exit(0)"
